title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, Claude Code's creator, uses the platform's skills feature through agents, hooks, and loops to automate workflows. The video breaks down Cherny's testing methodology for skill creation and highlights underutilized powerful features within Claude Code.
